_meta.produced_by: Claude Code — Thomas Brennan (Architect). First application of MK-P6 DRS for Software.

paper_title: Fracttalix Sentinel v12.2: Software AI Layer — DRS for Software Feasibility Demonstration
verification_protocol: MK-P6 DRS for Software, Section 7.3 Phase-Ready Verdict
inference_rule_inventory: IR-1 through IR-8 — Fracttalix Phase 1-2 Merged, S42

phase_ready.note: Comprehensive DRS-for-Software layer. 4 placeholder claims: PH-SFW.1 (P1 FRM physics), PH-SFW.2 (auto_tune optimality), PH-SFW.3 (multi-stream correlation accuracy), PH-SFW.4 (CLI output format). NOT-PHASE-READY due to placeholder claims that block. 374 tests passing on main.

claim_registry.label: Python platform requirement
claim_registry.name: Python platform requirement
claim_registry.statement: Sentinel requires Python >= 3.9. The software does not verify the interpreter version at runtime; it assumes the platform satisfies this requirement.
claim_registry.note: Type A: platform assumption. Violation manifests as syntax errors or import failures, not graceful error messages.

claim_registry.label: Zero required dependencies
claim_registry.name: Zero required dependencies
claim_registry.statement: Sentinel has no required external dependencies. All core functionality uses Python standard library only. numpy, scipy, matplotlib, numba, and tqdm are optional enhancements.
claim_registry.source: pyproject.toml dependencies = []; fracttalix/_compat.py optional import guards
claim_registry.note: Type A: architectural assumption. Optional dependencies degrade gracefully with ImportWarning.

claim_registry.label: numpy FFT correctness
claim_registry.name: numpy FFT correctness
claim_registry.statement: When numpy is available, Sentinel trusts that numpy.fft.rfft returns the correct discrete Fourier transform of a real sequence. The oscillatory channel (Channel 2) depends on this.
claim_registry.note: Type A: dependency contract. If numpy changes FFT behavior, all Channel 2 claims must be re-evaluated.

claim_registry.label: IEEE 754 floating-point arithmetic
claim_registry.name: IEEE 754 floating-point arithmetic
claim_registry.statement: Sentinel assumes input values are finite IEEE 754 float64 values. Behavior on NaN, Inf, or non-numeric input is undefined.
claim_registry.source: fracttalix/detector.py update_and_check() — no input validation on value parameter

claim_registry.label: FRM physics foundation
claim_registry.name: FRM physics foundation
claim_registry.statement: Sentinel v12.2 implements the Fractal Rhythm Model f(t) = B + A·e^(−λt)·cos(ωt+φ) as its theoretical foundation. Parameters ω = π/(2·τ_gen) and λ ≈ |α|/(Γ·τ_gen) are derived from Hopf bifurcation physics (P1 Sections 3–4, Session 43). Zero free parameters.
claim_registry.source: fracttalix/__init__.py import chain; fracttalix/steps/frequency.py; fracttalix/steps/foundation.py RegimeStep
claim_registry.note: Type A: inherits P1 dependency chain. P1 is PHASE-READY; PH-SFW.1 does not block.

claim_registry.label: Package version
claim_registry.name: Package version
claim_registry.statement: This AI layer describes Fracttalix Sentinel v12.2.0 as defined by __version__ = '12.2.0' in fracttalix/__init__.py.

claim_registry.label: SentinelResult structure
claim_registry.name: SentinelResult structure
claim_registry.statement: SentinelResult is a dict subclass containing at minimum: score, alert, anomaly, warmup, z_score, anomaly_score, alert_reasons, step, value. Additional fields include frequency_bands, structural_snapshot, coupling_matrix, channel_coherence, degradation_sequence, cascade_precursor_active, maintenance_burden, tainter_regime, kuramoto_order, phi_kappa_separation, diagnostic_window_steps.
claim_registry.source: fracttalix/types.py SentinelResult; fracttalix/detector.py update_and_check() result defaults lines 132–182

claim_registry.label: AlertType enumeration
claim_registry.name: AlertType enumeration
claim_registry.statement: AlertType enum has values: POINT_ANOMALY, CONTEXTUAL_ANOMALY, COLLECTIVE_ANOMALY, DRIFT_ANOMALY, VARIANCE_ANOMALY, REGIME_CHANGE, EWS_WARNING, BAND_ANOMALY, COUPLING_DEGRADATION, STRUCTURAL_RHYTHMIC_DECOUPLING, CASCADE_PRECURSOR. 11 alert types total.

claim_registry.label: SentinelConfig defaults
claim_registry.name: SentinelConfig defaults
claim_registry.statement: SentinelConfig is a frozen dataclass with 30+ configurable parameters. Key defaults: alpha=0.1, dev_alpha=0.1, multiplier=3.0, warmup_periods=30, window_size=50.

claim_registry.label: 37-step pipeline architecture
claim_registry.name: 37-step pipeline architecture
claim_registry.statement: The default pipeline consists of exactly 37 DetectorStep instances constructed by _build_default_pipeline(config). Steps are numbered 1–37 and execute sequentially via a shared StepContext.

claim_registry.label: Three-channel model architecture
claim_registry.name: Three-channel model architecture
claim_registry.statement: Pipeline steps are organized into three channels: Channel 1 (Structural) — statistical moments, stationarity, EWMA, CUSUM; Channel 2 (Rhythmic) — FFT decomposition, frequency bands, phase-amplitude coupling; Channel 3 (Temporal) — degradation sequence ordering, cascade precursor detection.

claim_registry.label: Maintenance burden definition
claim_registry.name: Maintenance burden definition
claim_registry.statement: μ = 1 − κ̄ where κ̄ is the mean cross-frequency coupling score. Engineering heuristic, not derived from Tainter's socioeconomic model. Regime thresholds: TAINTER_CRITICAL (μ ≥ 0.9), TAINTER_WARNING (μ ≥ 0.75), REDUCED_RESERVE (μ ≥ 0.5), HEALTHY (μ < 0.5).

claim_registry.label: Phi-kappa separation metric
claim_registry.name: Phi-kappa separation metric
claim_registry.statement: phi_kappa_separation = Φ − κ̄. Interpretation: > 0.05 → COHERENCE_LED; < −0.05 → COUPLING_LED; |separation| ≤ 0.05 → BALANCED. Definitional signal classification, not a causal claim.

claim_registry.label: Streaming single-observation API
claim_registry.name: Streaming single-observation API
claim_registry.statement: update_and_check(value) accepts exactly one scalar observation and returns exactly one SentinelResult. The method is stateful (increments internal step counter) and deterministic given the same sequence of inputs.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: EXISTS input_sequence S SUCH THAT (len(outputs) != len(S) OR type(output_i) != SentinelResult FOR ANY i)

WHERE.S: list · dimensionless · any finite sequence of float64 values
WHERE.outputs: list · SentinelResult instances · one per call to update_and_check

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Create SentinelDetector(); iterate S calling update_and_check(v) for each v; verify output count equals input count and each output is SentinelResult; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: empty sequence (len=0) → zero outputs → NOT FALSIFIED; single element → one output → NOT FALSIFIED
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Streaming architecture: one observation in, one result out. No batching, no buffering of outputs. Each call updates internal state and returns immediately.

claim_registry.sample_falsification_observation: det.update_and_check(1.0) returns None → type != SentinelResult → FALSIFIED

claim_registry.label: Three-channel detection completeness
claim_registry.name: Three-channel detection completeness
claim_registry.statement: The three-channel pipeline (statistical Channel 1, oscillatory Channel 2, regime Channel 3) jointly detects all alert conditions that any single-channel sub-pipeline would detect. No alert type is exclusive to a channel subset that the combined 37-step pipeline misses.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: EXISTS alert_class A IN alert_type_universe SUCH THAT single_channel_detectable(A) = TRUE AND combined_pipeline_detectable(A) = FALSE

WHERE.alert_type_universe: set · all 11 AlertType enum values · fracttalix/types.py
WHERE.single_channel_detectable: binary · TRUE if alert_class A is fired by at least one channel sub-pipeline on a synthetic test stream
WHERE.combined_pipeline_detectable: binary · TRUE if alert_class A is fired by the full 37-step pipeline on the same stream

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: For each AlertType, verify reachability in combined pipeline; enumerate alert_type → step mapping in test files; finite enumeration over 11 values
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: combined_pipeline_detectable = FALSE for any A where single_channel_detectable = TRUE → FALSIFIED; all 11 reachable → NOT FALSIFIED
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Combined pipeline is superset of each channel's steps. By construction, any alert fired by a channel sub-pipeline is firable by the full pipeline.

claim_registry.sample_falsification_observation: BAND_ANOMALY fired by Channel 2 but not by combined pipeline → FALSIFIED

claim_registry.label: Test suite passes
claim_registry.name: Test suite passes
claim_registry.statement: All 374 tests pass on Python 3.9–3.12 with zero required dependencies.

WHERE.test_failures: integer · count of FAILED tests reported by pytest
WHERE.test_errors: integer · count of ERROR tests reported by pytest

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Run: pip install -e '.[test]' && python -m pytest tests/ -v; count failures and errors; finite
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: 374 tests across 12 test files as of v12.2.0. CI matrix: Python 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12.

claim_registry.sample_falsification_observation: pytest reports 1 FAILED in test_steps_foundation.py → FALSIFIED

claim_registry.label: Backward compatibility — v7.x kwargs
claim_registry.name: Backward compatibility — v7.x kwargs
claim_registry.statement: All 35 v7.x kwargs accepted by SentinelDetector() are correctly mapped to SentinelConfig equivalents via _legacy_kwargs_to_config. No exception raised; correct config field populated.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: EXISTS kwarg K IN legacy_mapping_keys SUCH THAT (raises_exception(K) = TRUE OR config_value_matches(K) = FALSE)

WHERE.legacy_mapping_keys: set · 35 keys including rsi_window alias · fracttalix/detector.py lines 28–64
WHERE.raises_exception: binary · TRUE if SentinelDetector(**{K: valid_value}) raises exception
WHERE.config_value_matches: binary · TRUE if resulting config field equals provided value

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: For each key K, construct SentinelDetector(**{K: valid_value}); verify no exception; verify config field; finite over 35 keys
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: any exception or mismatch for any key → FALSIFIED
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: 34 direct mappings + rsi_window alias = 35 keys. Tested in tests/test_backward_compat.py.

claim_registry.label: Cascade precursor conjunction requirement
claim_registry.name: Cascade precursor conjunction requirement
claim_registry.statement: CASCADE_PRECURSOR alert fires if and only if all three conditions simultaneously true: (1) coupling degradation active, (2) structural-rhythmic decoupling active, (3) at least cascade_ews_threshold EWS indicators elevated.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: cascade_fires = TRUE AND (coupling_active = FALSE OR decoupling_active = FALSE OR elevated_ews < cascade_ews_threshold)

WHERE.elevated_ews: integer · count of {ews_score, anomaly_score, rfi} exceeding config.ews_threshold

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Test all 8 Boolean combinations of (coupling, decoupling, ews≥threshold); verify cascade fires only when all three true; finite 8-case enumeration
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: fires when any condition false → FALSIFIED; does not fire when all true → also FALSIFIED
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Safety design gate: CASCADE_PRECURSOR carries CRITICAL severity. Single-channel anomaly must not escalate alone.

claim_registry.sample_falsification_observation: coupling=TRUE, decoupling=FALSE, ews=3, cascade fires → FALSIFIED

claim_registry.label: Config parameter validation
claim_registry.name: Config parameter validation
claim_registry.statement: SentinelConfig raises ValueError in __post_init__ for any out-of-range parameter: alpha∉(0,1], dev_alpha∉(0,1], multiplier≤0, warmup_periods<1, n_channels<1, aqb_q_low≥aqb_q_high.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: EXISTS P IN invalid_params SUCH THAT raises_ValueError(P) = FALSE

WHERE.invalid_params: set · parameter dicts violating any of the 6 rules
WHERE.raises_ValueError: binary · TRUE if SentinelConfig(**P) raises ValueError

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: For each of 6 rules, construct one invalid param dict; verify ValueError raised; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: no ValueError for any invalid set → FALSIFIED; ValueError for valid set → also FALSIFIED
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: 6 validation rules enforced at construction time via __post_init__. Frozen dataclass.

claim_registry.label: State persistence round-trip
claim_registry.name: State persistence round-trip
claim_registry.statement: save_state() serializes detector state to JSON; load_state() restores it. Step counter _n is preserved; subsequent results are reproducible.

WHERE.pre_save_n: integer · detector._n after warmup, before save
WHERE.post_load_result: dict · result of update_and_check(test_value) after load
WHERE.pre_continuation_result: dict · result of update_and_check(same test_value) on original detector

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Warm detector T=50 steps; save; create fresh detector; load; compare _n and result of next update; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: any mismatch in _n or result keys → FALSIFIED
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: save_state includes config, bank, per-step state_dict, and step counter. JSON round-trip.

claim_registry.label: Warmup period behavior
claim_registry.name: Warmup period behavior
claim_registry.statement: During the first warmup_periods observations (default 30), result['warmup'] is True and no alerts fire. After warmup_periods, warmup is False and alerts can fire.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: (step < warmup_periods AND result['warmup'] = FALSE) OR (step < warmup_periods AND result['alert'] = TRUE) OR (step >= warmup_periods AND result['warmup'] = TRUE)
falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Create detector with default config; feed 60 values; verify warmup=True for steps 0–29 and warmup=False for steps 30–59; verify no alerts during warmup; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: step = warmup_periods - 1 → warmup=True (inclusive); step = warmup_periods → warmup=False (exclusive threshold)
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Warmup allows EWMA and window statistics to stabilize. Alerting during warmup would produce false positives from insufficient data.

claim_registry.label: auto_tune returns valid detector
claim_registry.name: auto_tune returns valid detector
claim_registry.statement: auto_tune() returns a SentinelDetector with a valid SentinelConfig regardless of input data. If labeled_data provided, selects config maximizing F1. If no labels, selects config minimizing false positive rate.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: auto_tune(data) raises exception OR type(auto_tune(data)) != SentinelDetector

WHERE.data: list · dimensionless · any non-empty sequence of finite float64 values

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Call auto_tune(data) with representative data; verify return type; verify config is valid SentinelConfig; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: any exception → FALSIFIED; return type not SentinelDetector → FALSIFIED
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Grid search over alphas=[0.05, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3] and multipliers=[2.0, 2.5, 3.0, 3.5, 4.0]. 20 combinations evaluated.

claim_registry.label: MultiStreamSentinel cross-stream correlation
claim_registry.name: MultiStreamSentinel cross-stream correlation
claim_registry.statement: MultiStreamSentinel.cross_stream_correlations() returns pairwise z-score Pearson correlation coefficients between streams.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: correlation_matrix_shape != (n_streams, n_streams) OR diagonal_values != 1.0 OR values_outside_range = TRUE

WHERE.n_streams: integer · number of streams in MultiStreamSentinel
WHERE.correlation_matrix_shape: tuple · shape of returned correlation matrix
WHERE.diagonal_values: float · values on diagonal of correlation matrix
WHERE.values_outside_range: binary · TRUE if any value < -1.0 or > 1.0

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Create MultiStreamSentinel with 3 streams; feed correlated data; call cross_stream_correlations(); verify shape, diagonal, and range; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: shape mismatch → FALSIFIED; diagonal != 1.0 → FALSIFIED; any value outside [-1, 1] → FALSIFIED
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Pearson correlation is bounded [-1, 1] by definition. Diagonal is self-correlation = 1.0.

claim_registry.sample_falsification_observation: 3-stream sentinel returns 2x2 matrix → shape mismatch → FALSIFIED

claim_registry.label: Detector reset clears state
claim_registry.name: Detector reset clears state
claim_registry.statement: reset() restores detector to initial state: step counter to 0, history cleared, all pipeline step states reset, window bank cleared.

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Create detector; feed 50 values; call reset(); verify _n=0 and history empty; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: _n != 0 after reset → FALSIFIED; history non-empty after reset → FALSIFIED
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: reset() is used for restarting analysis on new data streams without creating a new detector instance.

claim_registry.label: numpy fallback warning
claim_registry.name: numpy fallback warning
claim_registry.statement: When numpy is not available, Sentinel emits an ImportWarning on first use if config.warn_on_numpy_fallback is True (default). All functionality continues with stdlib-only math fallbacks.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: (numpy_absent AND warn_on_numpy_fallback = TRUE AND warning_emitted = FALSE) OR (numpy_absent AND functionality_fails = TRUE)

WHERE.numpy_absent: binary · TRUE if numpy import fails
WHERE.warning_emitted: binary · TRUE if ImportWarning is issued
WHERE.functionality_fails: binary · TRUE if any pipeline step raises exception due to missing numpy

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Run pytest in environment without numpy installed; verify ImportWarning emitted; verify all tests pass; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: no warning when numpy absent and warn=True → FALSIFIED; any step exception when numpy absent → FALSIFIED
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Zero-dependency architecture: numpy improves performance but is not required. CI matrix includes zero-dep run.

claim_registry.sample_falsification_observation: numpy absent, no ImportWarning emitted, warn_on_numpy_fallback=True → FALSIFIED

placeholder_register.description: FRM physics foundation dependency. Sentinel oscillatory and regime channels grounded in P1 Hopf bifurcation physics. P1 is PHASE-READY; does not block.
auto_tune optimality claim. Grid search returns best config but optimality relative to full parameter space is not tested. Needs labeled-data test with known optimal.
MultiStreamSentinel cross_stream_correlations accuracy. Correlation computation claimed but not verified against known correlated streams.
CLI output format. README claims fracttalix CLI command produces human-readable output. No test verifies CLI output format or content.

summary.note: First application of MK-P6 DRS for Software. Expanded from SFW-1 v1 (10 claims) to v2 (20 claims). 4 placeholders identified — 2 blocking, 2 non-blocking. NOT-PHASE-READY: honest accounting of gaps invisible to conventional coverage metrics.
